content.query:
/*******************************************************************************************************
  Author:       Rene Villarreal
  Create Date:  August 4, 2022
  Description:  Create view v_ShipmentsYTDPY_ConsumerDashboard
********************************************************************************************************
SUMMARY OF CHANGES

Date                    Author                    Comments
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
August 4, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Create original view
********************************************************************************************************/


CREATE VIEW		v_ShipmentsYTDPY_ConsumerDashboard
AS

SELECT 			Brand, sum(SHIPMENT) AS [YTD Shipments Prior Year]
FROM 			ECM.YTD_SHIPMENTS
WHERE 			YEAR = YEAR(CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )) - 1
AND 			MONTH <= MONTH(CAST( GETDATE() AS Date ))
GROUP BY		Brand
